blockers.description: Canonical export output from tools/export-season-config.php is rejected by SimulationConfigPreflight because the export includes created_at while preflight only allows SimulationSeason::SEASON_ECONOMY_COLUMNS.
Fresh staged candidate generation emitted hoarding-subsystem candidates that fail lint/preflight against the fixed baseline because hoarding_sink_enabled=0.
Focused PHPUnit qualification shows Simulation D payload equality fails for same-seed reruns because config_audit artifact paths differ between runs.
